organizers.name: Dilip Patil
organizers.title: Marathon Runner & Event Director
organizers.bio: Keen marathoner since 2003. Completed 100+ marathons across India and internationally. Six-time world major marathoner. Nine-time COMRADES Marathon finisher. International marathons: Mumbai, Munich, Prague, Jungfrau, Dubai, Du-Médoc, Amsterdam, New York, Chicago, Abu Dhabi, Boston, London.
